institutional_fraud_mechanism.definition: The systematic suppression of immutable forensic data through the mandatory 'oral reading' requirement in civil proceedings to neutralize criminal liability

identified_tactics: The Orality Trap: Ignoring SHA-256 sealed data if not 'vocalized' by corrupt agents
Ghost Sessions: Concealing hearing times to prevent victim's attendance
Judicial Opinion Hijacking: Replacing facts of ECHR Art. 3 violations (blocked pensions) with 'personal judicial opinions'
Witness Tampering: Advocate Ion Gusanu's 600 MDL 'off-record' payment to bypass 25.2M MDL liability
geopolitical_impact: Intentional economic sabotage of UN/US-backed humanitarian assets (25,210,256.15 MDL)
